user_query: I'm planning to start a cake business and I need some creative cake recipes. Can you provide me with a list of different cake options along with their images? Also, give me the detailed recipe for a cake with a medium difficulty level. Please include the portion size, preparation time, ingredients, step-by-step method, and an image.

TaskList.description: Retrieve a list of different creative cake options along with their images.
Select a cake recipe from the list with medium difficulty and gather detailed information about it.
Compile the detailed recipe including portion size, preparation time, ingredients, step-by-step method, and an image.
